props.name: submissionStatus
props.type: false | null | { state: submitting | success | error; message: ReactNode }

compositionPolicy.submission: No submit interception; native URL actions and React server actions pass through.
compositionPolicy.adapters: RHF and TanStack Form integrate through their native props and submit handlers without core dependencies.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: A non-empty submissionStatus adds truthful busy state and a polite or assertive persistent rail. Omitting it, passing false or null, or supplying statically empty message content emits no status node, role, live region, data-submission-state, or derived aria-busy.
